text.text:
*NEW SLIDE TYPES SIGNALS — 4–10 MAY 2026*

*🔸 Adoption trend:*
— Pin on Image: 212 users (+15% WoW, 4wk 📉 fading), 320 times. Rank: #9 of 9 interactive, #22 overall.
— Idea Board: 322 users (+65% WoW, 4wk 📈 growing), 663 times. Rank: #7 of 9 interactive, #18 overall.
— Ranking: 345 users (+12% WoW, 4wk 📉 fading), 568 times. Rank: #5 of 9 interactive, #16 overall.
— By responses generated (interactive only): Pin on Image #8, Idea Board #6, Ranking #7

*🔸 Repeat-use (slides per user, this week):*
— Pin on Image: 1.5
— Idea Board: 2.1
— Ranking: 1.6
— Range across non-quiz interactive slides: 1.5–2.7

*🔸 Notable:*
— Idea Board is the runaway: +65% WoW users, fourth straight week of growth (28 → 62 → 195 → 322). The only one of the three trending up.
— Ranking jumped into the top-5 of interactive picks (#7 → #5) but sits at #7 on responses — presenters reach for it more than audiences engage with it.
— Pin on Image sets the floor on repeat-use at 1.5 slides per user, below the 1.7–2.7 range across the existing six.

<https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/2668743/view/3205947/app/boards#id=11071959|Mixpanel dashboard> · <https://bi.ahaslide.com/question/5600-how-many-events-each-slide-type-contributes-all-events|Metabase report>

<@U05PK31G152> <@UF9HYBY2G>
